use_case_name: Remote Stop ISO 15118 Charging from CSMS

structured.name: Remote Stop ISO 15118 Charging from CSMS
structured.objective: See ISO15118-1, use case Objective F2, page 38.
structured.description: See ISO15118-1, use case Description F2, page 38.
structured.prerequisites:
- If authorization according use cases in Functional Block C is applied, it SHALL be finished
successfully.
See ISO15118-1, use case Prerequisites F2, page 38.
structured.postconditions: See ISO15118-1, use case End conditions F2, page 38.

requirements.precondition:
When the CSMS receives a remote
stop transaction trigger (For example
when terminating using a smartphone
app, exceeding a (non local) prepaid
credit.)
requirements.definition:
The CSMS SHALL send a
RequestStopTransactionRequest to the Charging
Station with the transactionId of the transaction.

The Charging Station SHALL stop the energy offer,
unlock the cable and send a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Updated) to
the CSMS.

requirements.precondition:
F04.FR.02 AND
When the EV Driver unplugs the cable.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended,
stoppedReason = Remote) to the CSMS.

requirements.precondition:
When configured to send meter data
in the TransactionEventRequest
(eventType = Ended), See: Meter
Values - Configuration
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL add the configured
measurands to the optional meterValue field in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended) sent
to the CSMS to provide more details about
transaction usage.

requirements.precondition:
F04.FR.04
AND
The Charging Station is running low on
memory
requirements.definition: The Charging Station MAY drop meter data.

When dropping meter data, the Charging Station
SHALL drop intermediate values first (2nd value,
4th value, 6th etc), not drop the start and end values
from the list.

chunks.content:
# F04 - Remote Stop ISO 15118 Charging from CSMS

**Objective:** See ISO15118-1, use case Objective F2, page 38.

**Description:** See ISO15118-1, use case Description F2, page 38.

**Actors:** EV, CSMS, Charging Station

**Prerequisites:** - If authorization according use cases in Functional Block C is applied, it SHALL be finished
successfully.
See ISO15118-1, use case Prerequisites F2, page 38.

**Postconditions:** See ISO15118-1, use case End conditions F2, page 38.

metadata.heading: F04 - Remote Stop ISO 15118 Charging from CSMS
metadata.use_case_name: Remote Stop ISO 15118 Charging from CSMS

chunks.content:
# F04 - Requirements

**F04.FR.01**
Precondition: When the CSMS receives a remote
stop transaction trigger (For example
when terminating using a smartphone
app, exceeding a (non local) prepaid
credit.)
The CSMS SHALL send a
RequestStopTransactionRequest to the Charging
Station with the transactionId of the transaction.

**F04.FR.02**
Precondition: F04.FR.01
The Charging Station SHALL stop the energy offer,
unlock the cable and send a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Updated) to
the CSMS.

**F04.FR.03**
Precondition: F04.FR.02 AND
When the EV Driver unplugs the cable.
The Charging Station SHALL send a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended,
stoppedReason = Remote) to the CSMS.

**F04.FR.04**
Precondition: When configured to send meter data
in the TransactionEventRequest
(eventType = Ended), See: Meter
Values - Configuration
The Charging Station SHALL add the configured
measurands to the optional meterValue field in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended) sent
to the CSMS to provide more details about
transaction usage.

**F04.FR.05**
Precondition: F04.FR.04
AND
The Charging Station is running low on
memory
The Charging Station MAY drop meter data.

**F04.FR.06**
Precondition: F04.FR.05
When dropping meter data, the Charging Station
SHALL drop intermediate values first (2nd value,
4th value, 6th etc), not drop the start and end values
from the list.

metadata.heading: F04 - Requirements
metadata.use_case_name: Remote Stop ISO 15118 Charging from CSMS
